title: GoldRush TypeScript SDK
description: Official TypeScript SDK with full type safety for every GoldRush API endpoint — install once and get autocomplete, type checking, and automatic error handling for all 50+ endpoints.
useCase: Bootstrap any TypeScript or JavaScript project with full on-chain data access in under 5 minutes — install the SDK, paste your API key, and start querying.

keyParams.apiKey: GoldRush API key — get one free at goldrush.dev
